query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supportGroups) as support_groups, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ebooks) as ebooks, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blogPosts) as blog_posts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM newsletterSubscribers) as newsletter_subs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dailyGoodNewsEditions) as daily_news;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user y9xXqMvzCrNXPbj.1987515a4b92 --database C4sZdm4AzTGBpMWqRug5mc --execute SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supportGroups) as support_groups, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ebooks) as ebooks, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blogPosts) as blog_posts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM newsletterSubscribers) as newsletter_subs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dailyGoodNewsEditions) as daily_news;
